zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Bulstrode於大約1420年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾潔利時，他的父親Thomas William Bulstrode17歲，母親Agnes Norreys19歲。他於1455年4月19日與Alice Knyffe在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾巴金哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1502年5月19日在英國巴金哈姆爾霍頓享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Bulstrode于大约1420年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾潔利时，他的父亲Thomas William Bulstrode17岁，母亲Agnes Norreys19岁。他于1455年4月19日与Alice Knyffe在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾巴金哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1502年5月19日在英国巴金哈姆爾霍頓享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bulstrode
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bolstridge
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of Bulstrode, a habitational name from Bulstrode in Buckinghamshire, meaning ‘bull marsh’ from Old English bula ‘bull’ + strōd ‘marshy land’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Bulstrode was born about 1420, in Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Thomas William Bulstrode, was 17 and his mother, Agnes Norreys, was 19. He married Alice Knyffe on 19 April 1455, in Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 19 May 1502, in Horton, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Bulstrode est né environ 1420, à Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas William Bulstrode, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Agnes Norreys, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Alice Knyffe le 19 avril 1455, à Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 19 mai 1502, à Horton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Bulstrode um 1420 in Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas William Bulstrode 17 und seine Mutter Agnes Norreys 19. Er hat am 19. April 1455 in Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Knyffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Mai 1502 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Horton, Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Bulstrode è nato il circa 1420 nel Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas William Bulstrode, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Norreys, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Alice Knyffe il 19 aprile 1455, nel Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 maggio 1502, nel Horton, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Bulstrodeが約1420年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアヘジャーリーで生まれた時，父Thomas William Bulstrodeは17歳，母Agnes Norreysは19歳であった。1455年4月19日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアブクインガムでAlice Knyffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1502年5月19日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアホールトンで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Bulstrode(이)가 대략 1420년 영국 벅잉함실르 헤저리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas William Bulstrode(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Norreys(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1455년 4월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 벅잉함에서 Alice Knyffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1502년 5월 19일 영국 벅잉함실르 호르턴에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Bulstrode nasceu aproximadamente 1420, em Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas William Bulstrode, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Norreys, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Knyffe em 19 de abril de 1455, em Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de maio de 1502, em Horton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Bulstrode родился около 1420 г. в местности хеджирли, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas William Bulstrode было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Norreys, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Knyffe 19 апреля 1455 г. в местности буккингхам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 19 мая 1502 г. в местности хауртон, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Bulstrode nació aproximadamente 1420, en Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas William Bulstrode, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Agnes Norreys, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Alice Knyffe el 19 de abril de 1455, en Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de mayo de 1502, en Horton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 83 años.
